meaning: adj.没有精神的,没有灵魂的,卑鄙的,无情的
examples: They live in soulless concrete blocks.
A soulless shopping centre stands across from one of the few buildings with character, the town hall.
The American-born architect Robert Venturi concluded that if simplicity is done badly, the result is soulless design.
Does it relate to the impression that these characters are somehow "soulless, " and in what ways?
Phoenix , Arizona, is possibly the most soulless, cookie-cutter city I have visited.
